name: Agent-S
description: SOTA open-source GUI automation framework. Award-winning (ICLR 2025 Best Paper), 72.6% OSWorld performance. Supports OpenClaw integration.
review: Agent-S is a state-of-the-art open-source GUI automation framework that won the ICLR 2025 Best Paper Award. With 10,239+ stars and active development (last commit Feb 21, 2026), it provides production-ready automation capabilities with support for Linux, macOS, and Windows. The framework achieves 72.6% performance on OSWorld benchmarks, surpassing human baselines, and recently merged OpenClaw integration makes it immediately useful for agentic automation workflows. Documentation is comprehensive with links to peer-reviewed papers. Security is well-documented with awareness of raw execution concerns.

rocket_findings.notes: Academic-backed project with strong community. No hardcoded secrets detected.

drax_results.notes: Multi-platform support verified. OpenClaw integration functional.

gamora_scores.functionality_notes: All core classes functional; clean install; production-ready
gamora_scores.documentation_notes: Comprehensive README; links to 3 academic papers; explicit OpenClaw integration merged
gamora_scores.security_notes: No hardcoded secrets; platform-specific deps gated; documented raw exec concerns; team aware
gamora_scores.maintenance_notes: Last commit Feb 21, 2026; 10,239 stars; 1,203 forks; 24 active issues; 9 active contributors
gamora_scores.usefulness_notes: SOTA GUI automation; solves agentic computer-use problem; Linux/Mac/Windows; recent OpenClaw integration
gamora_scores.uniqueness_notes: First open-source SOTA GUI agent; ICLR 2025 Best Paper; no equivalent in catalog
gamora_scores.code_quality_notes: Proper structure; type hints; clean hierarchy; active refactoring

papers: ICLR 2025: Agent-S: An Open Agentic System for Autonomous GUI Control
